296 I3900_HIP_FRCTR_CD I3900_HIP_FRCTR_CD I3900 Active Diagnoses: Hip Fracture Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of any hip fracture that has a relationship to the current status, treatments or monitoring (e.g., sub-capital fractures, and fractures of the trochanter and femoral neck) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
